description: Phase 24 client-authorized balancing rules (Item 16: exclude 2023/603703R dividend-on-deposit from DB balancing).

client_gl_exclusions.pactg_detection: CREDIT_ACCOUNT/DEBIT_ACCOUNT contains 2023 or 603703R on claim activity window
client_gl_exclusions.lifecycle_fallback: 0038 clearing hub total when no PACTG GL rows detected on claim window

DEATH_CLAIM.label: Death Claim
DEATH_CLAIM.balancing_formula: gross + interest - loan_principal - loan_interest - surrender_charge - withholding = payout_minus_div_on_dep
DEATH_CLAIM.settlement_chain_guidance: 0038 clearing paired to 2023/603703R represents dividend-on-deposit; exclude from DB balancing per client Item 16.
DEATH_CLAIM.confidence_notes: Client-approved claims may proceed to UAT even when residual variance remains after GL exclusion.

SURRENDER_CLAIM.label: Surrender Claim
SURRENDER_CLAIM.balancing_formula: total_cash + partial_surrender - surrender_charge - loan_principal - loan_interest = disbursement
SURRENDER_CLAIM.settlement_chain_guidance: Loan offset-only chains may balance at zero until disbursement codes appear.
SURRENDER_CLAIM.confidence_notes: Disbursement codes optional for funded-only surrender events.

DISBURSEMENT_CLAIM.label: Disbursement Claim
DISBURSEMENT_CLAIM.settlement_chain_guidance: Treat as payment/disbursement event chain; do not require gross benefit reconstruction.
DISBURSEMENT_CLAIM.confidence_notes: Net payment equals payout total by profile design.
